description: You are a demand planner creating a trend analysis report to smooth out daily volatility using the file sales_data.csv located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv. Build a Power BI report named Moving_Average_Report.pbix and save it to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\. The report must include a page renamed to 'Trend Analysis' featuring a line chart comparing Monthly_Sales and Moving_Avg_3M over the Sale_Date, a card visual displaying the Trend_Variance, and a slicer for Product_Category. Within the data model, define the following measures: Monthly_Sales (the sum of Sales_Amount), Moving_Avg_3M (a 3-month rolling average of Monthly_Sales), and Trend_Variance (the difference between Monthly_Sales and Moving_Avg_3M).
